pluggableDatabaseName.description: Optional. The pluggable database associated with the Database. The name must begin with an alphabetic character and can contain a maximum of thirty alphanumeric characters.

properties.description: Optional. The properties of the Database.

tdeWalletPasswordSecretVersion.description: Optional. The resource name of a secret version in Secret Manager which contains the TDE wallet password for the database. Format: projects/{project}/secrets/{secret}/versions/{version}. Note: Only one of `tde_wallet_password_secret_version` or `tde_wallet_password` can be populated.

gcpOracleZone.description: Output only. The GCP Oracle zone where the Database is created.

name.description: Identifier. The name of the Database resource in the following format: projects/{project}/locations/{region}/databases/{database}

tdeWalletPassword.description: Optional. The TDE wallet password for the database. Note: Only one of `tde_wallet_password_secret_version` or `tde_wallet_password` can be populated.

adminPasswordSecretVersion.description: Optional. The resource name of a secret version in Secret Manager which contains the database admin user's password. Format: projects/{project}/secrets/{secret}/versions/{version}. Note: Only one of `admin_password_secret_version` or `admin_password` can be populated.

databaseId.description: Optional. The database ID of the Database.

dbUniqueName.description: Optional. The DB_UNIQUE_NAME of the Oracle Database being backed up.

dbName.description: Optional. The database name. The name must begin with an alphabetic character and can contain a maximum of eight alphanumeric characters. Special characters are not permitted.

adminPassword.description: Optional. The password for the default ADMIN user. Note: Only one of `admin_password_secret_version` or `admin_password` can be populated.

ncharacterSet.description: Optional. The national character set for the database. The default is AL16UTF16.

characterSet.description: Optional. The character set for the database. The default is AL32UTF8.

dbHomeName.description: Optional. The name of the DbHome resource associated with the Database.

opsInsightsStatus.description: Output only. The Status of Operations Insights for this Database.
enumDescriptions: Indicates that the operations insights are being enabled.
Indicates that the operations insights are enabled.
Indicates that the operations insights are being disabled.
Indicates that the operations insights are not enabled.
Indicates that the operations insights failed to enable.
Indicates that the operations insights failed to disable.

pluggableDatabaseId.description: Optional. The ID of the pluggable database associated with the Database. The ID must be unique within the project and location.

ociUrl.description: Output only. HTTPS link to OCI resources exposed to Customer via UI Interface.

createTime.description: Output only. The date and time that the Database was created.

nextPageToken.description: The standard List next-page token.

operations.description: A list of operations that matches the specified filter in the request.

unreachable.description: Unordered list. Unreachable resources. Populated when the request sets `ListOperationsRequest.return_partial_success` and reads across collections. For example, when attempting to list all resources across all supported locations.

MaintenanceWindow.description: Maintenance window as defined by Oracle. https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/api/#/en/database/20160918/datatypes/MaintenanceWindow

months.description: Optional. Months during the year when maintenance should be performed.

isCustomActionTimeoutEnabled.description: Optional. If true, enables the configuration of a custom action timeout (waiting period) between database server patching operations.

hoursOfDay.description: Optional. The window of hours during the day when maintenance should be performed. The window is a 4 hour slot. Valid values are: 0 - represents time slot 0:00 - 3:59 UTC 4 - represents time slot 4:00 - 7:59 UTC 8 - represents time slot 8:00 - 11:59 UTC 12 - represents time slot 12:00 - 15:59 UTC 16 - represents time slot 16:00 - 19:59 UTC 20 - represents time slot 20:00 - 23:59 UTC

patchingMode.description: Optional. Cloud CloudExadataInfrastructure node patching method, either "ROLLING" or "NONROLLING". Default value is ROLLING.
enumDescriptions: Updates the Cloud Exadata database server hosts in a rolling fashion.
The non-rolling maintenance method first updates your storage servers at the same time, then your database servers at the same time.

preference.description: Optional. The maintenance window scheduling preference.

enumDescriptions: The day of the week is unspecified.

daysOfWeek.description: Optional. Days during the week when maintenance should be performed.

leadTimeWeek.description: Optional. Lead time window allows user to set a lead time to prepare for a down time. The lead time is in weeks and valid value is between 1 to 4.

customActionTimeoutMins.description: Optional. Determines the amount of time the system will wait before the start of each database server patching operation. Custom action timeout is in minutes and valid value is between 15 to 120 (inclusive).

weeksOfMonth.description: Optional. Weeks during the month when maintenance should be performed. Weeks start on the 1st, 8th, 15th, and 22nd days of the month, and have a duration of 7 days. Weeks start and end based on calendar dates, not days of the week.

unreachable.description: Unreachable locations when listing resources across all locations using wildcard location '-'.

nextPageToken.description: A token for fetching next page of response.
A token identifying a page of results the server should return.
